layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind default extended with generous padding
layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative pb-24 bg-[#FDFBF7]

card.description: Use cardless or soft-edged container for food drops. If using cards, use a 1px border instead of heavy shadows.

bottom_nav.layout: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto flex justify-around items-center px-4 py-3 z-50 shadow-[0_-4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]

badge_floating.layout: absolute px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full flex items-center gap-1.5 shadow-sm

countdown_timer.layout: flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Outfit for all headings and DM Sans for body text to give a fresh, organic, modern feel. DO NOT use Inter for headings.
Since this is a mobile-first app, wrap the main layout in a centered container: `max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#FDFBF7]`.
Food cards should be highly visual: large cover images (max-h-48), with badges floating over the image (e.g., '1.2 km away' or '4 left!'). Use object-cover for all images.
Use Phosphor Icons (`@phosphor-icons/react`) for sharp, premium iconography.
Implement a fixed bottom navigation bar with crystal glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-t border-[#E5E2DA]`).
Use `#C65D47` (terracotta) for urgency elements like countdown timers and 'strikethrough' original prices.
Ensure the checkout flow feels frictionless: large, tap-friendly buttons, clear price breakdowns.
ALL interactive elements and critical data containers MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='reserve-button'`, `data-testid='drop-card'`).
Do NOT use HTML native components for advanced interactions. Use Shadcn customized for mobile.
